name: complex_system_migration
description: An exhaustive multi-step system migration workflow demonstrating parallel proposal generation, per-module pipelined review/verification, a critic-critic loop for edge case fixes, and a final supervisor checkpoint.

params.spec_details: Migrate from REST to gRPC for performance improvement.

steps.prompt: Verify if the target repository {{params.target_repo}} is accessible and has all prerequisites configured. Output verdict=READY or BLOCKED.

agents.prompt: Analyze edge-cases and protocol safety issues for gRPC migration.
Draft architectural integration guide for REST-to-gRPC wrapper layers.

stages.prompt: Analyze compatibility of the component {{item}} with the proposed gRPC design from parallel_proposers.
Verify the compat findings for {{item}}. Ensure backwards compatibility checks are clean.

agent.prompt: Inspect the fixes in loop.collected. Complete? verdict=STOP if all components pass security checks.

body.prompt: Search for remaining bugs in the generated wrapper code. Collected fixes so far: {{loop.collected}}.
Apply fixes for flaws found in the current iteration.

steps.prompt: Review the full migration outcome. If the refinement loop or parallel proposals flagged high-severity integration risks, inject a deep audit step: deep_audit.
